modified_or_rejected_principles.idea: apply identical fee math to yes and no with no_bid for NO entry
modified_or_rejected_principles.reason: NO entry must be evaluated off executable no_ask, not no_bid
replace with model-relative deterioration + hysteresis, not permanent disable

modified_or_rejected_principles.idea: lower thresholds before measuring side/regime outcomes
modified_or_rejected_principles.reason: thresholds come after calibrated replay, not before
